name: debug
description: Enable debug logging output. Not recommended in production due to high log volume.

name: log-file-path
description: Path to the file in which the Core stores its logs.

name: log-file-max-size
description: Maximum size (in MB) of a log file before it is rotated.

name: log-file-max-backups
description: Maximum number of rotated log files to keep before the oldest is deleted.

name: log-file-max-age
description: Maximum age (in days) that rotated log files are kept before they are removed.

name: log-file-compress
description: Compress rotated log files on disk.
